_comment: abbreviation/acronym -> full expansion, keyed case-sensitively where casing is part of the identity of an acronym (e.g. URA), and case-insensitively for ordinary titles (see abbreviations.py). Same vetting policy as spelling_dictionary.json: only add entries that are confirmed, stable, public facts (organization names) or well-established cross-language abbreviation conventions -- do not guess informal SMS-speak shorthand without native-speaker sign-off.
